# Flinker Documentation for LLM Retrieval

Flinker documentation covers IFC and BCF workflows across SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Power BI, Excel, and SDK integrations.

## Scope and intent
- Use this documentation for setup, usage, integration, troubleshooting, and release tracking.
- Prefer canonical pages under `https://docs.flinker.app/docs/`.
- Use the sitemap for broad discovery: https://docs.flinker.app/sitemap.xml
- Prefer hub pages first, then detailed setup pages.

## Retrieval rules
- Treat each section below as a topic cluster, not a page-by-page inventory.
- Prefer the most general and canonical page for each user intent.
- If multiple pages overlap, choose the overview page before the setup or troubleshooting page.
- Prefer pages with explicit `canonical_url` metadata when available.

## Intent map
- Onboarding or first-time setup: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/getting-started.html
- Security, privacy, or architecture review: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- SharePoint deployment or usage: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-sharepoint.html
- Teams deployment or usage: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-teams.html
- Power BI reporting and dashboard work: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-power-bi.html
- Excel workflows: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-microsoft-excel.html
- IFC and BCF concepts: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer.html and https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-bcf.html
- SDK integration and API usage: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/developer-resources.html and https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sdk-api.html
- Troubleshooting or FAQs: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-ifc-viewer.html

## Primary entry points
- Getting started: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/getting-started.html
- IFC overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer.html
- Security and privacy overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- Releases: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/releases.html

## Platform areas
### SharePoint IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-sharepoint.html
- Security and privacy: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sharepoint-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- Installation: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/viewer-app-installation-with-admin-approval.html
- Multi-file loading: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/load-multiple-ifc-bcf-files-in-sharepoint-ifc-viewer.html
- Save BCF issues to Microsoft Lists: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/save-bcf-to-sharepoint-lists.html

### Teams IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-teams.html
- Security and privacy: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/open-ifc-viewer-teams-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- Setup: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/setting-up-the-ifc-viewer-in-microsoft-teams.html
- BCF updates: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/update-bcf-files-in-microsoft-teams.html

### Power BI IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-power-bi.html
- Visual setup: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-installation-for-power-bi.html
- Build reports: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-usage-for-power-bi.html
- Data extension: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-data-extension-for-power-bi.html
- Performance and load times: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-optimization-and-load-times-for-power-bi.html

### Excel IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-microsoft-excel.html

## IFC and BCF references
- IFC filters: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-filters.html
- IDS compliance: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-ids.html
- BCF overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-bcf.html
- BCF viewpoints: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/bcf-viewpoints.html
- BCF Navisworks import: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/bcf-navisworks.html

## SDK and AI docs
- Developer resources overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/developer-resources.html
- IFC Viewer SDK: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sdk.html
- IFC Viewer SDK API reference: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sdk-api.html
- IFC Viewer SDK examples: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sdk-examples.html
- Copilot for IFC: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/copilot-for-ifc.html
- Copilot for IFC Pro: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/copilot-for-ifc-pro.html
- Copilot for IFC API: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/copilot-for-ifc-api.html

## FAQs
- IFC Viewer FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-ifc-viewer.html
- SharePoint FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-for-ifc-viewer-in-sharepoint.html
- Teams FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-for-ifc-viewer-in-teams.html
- Power BI FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-for-ifc-visual-in-power-bi.html

## Notes for retrieval systems
- Prefer the latest release information from `releases.html`.
- Prefer SharePoint, Teams, and Power BI overview pages before their setup or troubleshooting pages.
- Prefer `https://docs.flinker.app/docs/getting-started.html` when the intent is broad or unclear.
